compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] docs/adr/0047-*.md written: context (cost-driven POC simplification + the auto-lander bug spiral), decision (relax pre-merge re-CI on non-conflicted rebase; main FFO->Rebase-If-Necessary; drop the bot entirely; agents Submit directly; existing post-merge main CI + manual revert as the bounded-risk safety net), consequences (accepted semantic-conflict risk, cost/maintainability win), and explicit SUPERSEDES of the lander portions of ADR 0040 (FFO) and ADR 0042 (auto-lander).
- [ ] Cites the OSS grounding (Gerrit submit types; Wikimedia's FFO->Merge-If-Necessary move; why Zuul/LUCI-CV are scale/cost-disproportionate here).
- [ ] Notes the one-line back-out (submit type revert) and the migration sequencing.
- [ ] File: docs/adr/0047-retire-autolander-rebase-if-necessary.md

file_impact.reason: the ADR file this task authors

compiled_state.title: ADR 0047: record the retire-lander / Rebase-If-Necessary decision
